title: HeXHub.net optimized | Enhanced
description: Shader- and Distant Horizons–ready client pack, optimized for vanilla multiplayer, with highest practical graphics settings.
body:
# About

This modpack focuses on **Complementary Shaders** and **Distant Horizons** for extended render distance.  
It adds a curated set of performance, visual and quality of life mods (map, HUD, voice chat, VR/controller support) while keeping **vanilla gameplay** and full compatibility with **unmodded survival servers**.  
It is tuned for **HeXHub.net**, but works on most vanilla and Paper-based survival servers.

## Core intent

- **Complementary Shaders by EminGT** enabled and preconfigured.  
- **Distant Horizons** for long-range terrain.  
- Only client-side visuals, performance tweaks and UI/QoL features, no gameplay changes.  
- Helper mods such as the minimap are preconfigured for fair play, avoiding xray-like cave view, mob radar or similar unfair information.  
- No freecam-style spectator mods included.

## Settings policy

- Preconfigured: graphics, shaders, map and a few utility mods (per edition), so everything works out of the box without unfair advantages.  
- Keybinds: only cleaned up to resolve conflicts between mods. Important vanilla and core mod keys keep their usual positions, less important mod keys are moved or unbound.  
- Other options such as sound, mouse and general gameplay settings stay close to vanilla defaults.  
- **Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)** keeps your own settings on updates. Pack defaults are only applied on fresh installs or when a mod is added and its config does not exist yet.

## Enhanced Edition
Graphics are set as high as they look noticeably better without unnecessary performance cost.  
Tested on a PC with **Ryzen 7900X**, **RTX 3070**, **32 GB RAM**.

## Other Editions
- **[Potato](https://modrinth.com/project/hexhub.net-optimized-potato)** – optimized for very weak PCs and laptops.  
  Tested on a notebook with **i7-7200U** and **8 GB RAM**.

- **[Handheld](https://modrinth.com/project/hexhub.net-optimized-handheld)** – tuned for entry-level gaming PCs and handhelds.  
  Tested on **Steam Deck OLED**.

## Current status
**Alpha**. Active development, frequent updates, possible issues. Feedback via Discord is welcome.

## Licenses and attribution
Third-party mods and resources remain under their original licenses. No relicensing of third-party files is performed.   
The full list of included mods and dependencies appears on this version page.  
Only pack-specific files (configs, assets, texts) are under this project’s **CC-BY-NC-4.0**.
